search sambhav mehra on google

Sambhav Mehra is a professional with a dual focus: he is a food and lifestyle photographer based in Dubai and a cybersecurity professional and student. He is also active as a food blogger on Threads and maintains a cybersecurity portfolio highlighting his skills.

## Professional Background

### Food Photography and Blogging
Sambhav Mehra operates as a food and lifestyle photographer under the name "SamFotoArt," based in Dubai, with experience across the Middle East. He has collaborated with numerous global and homegrown brands, including Remy Martin group, Zuma, Nammos, Roka, Al Tayer Group, MiMi Meifeir, Otoro, Caffe Nero, Lyre’s Non-Alcoholic, and Waldorf Astoria [About Me — SamFotoArt](https://www.samfotoart.com/about).

Beyond photography, he is an active food blogger on Threads, known by the handle "@foodtube_32," where he shares his passion for food and acts as a content creator for food-related content, including street food and waffles [Sambhav mehra (@foodtube_32) • Threads, Say more](https://www.threads.com/@foodtube_32). His Pinterest profile also showcases his photography interests, including food, group poses, and cocktails [Sambhav Mehra (sambhavmehra) - Profile | Pinterest](https://www.pinterest.com/sambhavmehra).

### Cybersecurity Expertise
Sambhav Mehra is a cybersecurity professional and a final-year B.Tech student specializing in Computer Science Engineering with a focus on Cyber Security at Sagar Group of Institutions - SISTec, with an expected graduation in June 2026 [Sambhav Mehra - VAPT || Cyber Security || Blockchain - LinkedIn](https://in.linkedin.com/in/sambhav-mehra-484427359), [Sambhav Mehra | Cybersecurity Portfolio](https://www.sambhavmehra.me/experience).

His expertise includes:
*   **Ethical Hacking and Vulnerability Assessment**: Skilled in penetration testing, security auditing, and protecting critical infrastructure from threats [Sambhav Mehra | Cybersecurity Portfolio](https://sambhavmehra.me).
*   **Network Security**: Experience with Sentinel SIEM and KQL for threat detection and focuses on network security, cryptography, and secure application development [Sambhav Mehra | Cybersecurity Portfolio](https://sambhavmehra.me), [Sambhav Mehra | Cybersecurity Portfolio](https://www.sambhavmehra.me/experience).
*   **AI-Powered Security Tools**: He has developed AI-powered security tools [Tavily Direct Answer for 'sambhav mehra'].
*   **Career Goals**: Actively seeking opportunities to begin his career in cybersecurity with a forward-thinking organization [Sambhav Mehra | Cybersecurity Portfolio](https://sambhavmehra.me).

### Other Activities and Profiles
*   **Oliv Profile**: He has a professional profile on Oliv, a career platform for talented youth, showcasing his professional and educational background [Sambhav Mehra's - Dubai - Oliv](https://oliv.com/profile/sambhav-26abe176-3723-11e8-9acb-adcf22ea022a).
*   **Fundraising**: Sambhav Mehra is also involved in fundraising, having campaigned and raised 1000 AED for "Battle Cancer Competition - Support The Child Fund" on YallaGive [Sambhav Mehra - YallaGive](https://www.yallagive.com/en/fundraiser/Sambhav-Mehra-17440).

## Quick Summary
Sambhav Mehra is a multifaceted professional primarily known as a Dubai-based food and lifestyle photographer (SamFotoArt) who has worked with global brands, and concurrently, a final-year cybersecurity student and professional specializing in ethical hacking, vulnerability assessment, and AI-powered security tools. He also engages as a food blogger (@foodtube_32 on Threads) and participates in fundraising activities.

Arre Sambhav, tumhare baare mein Google par search kiya gaya hai. Tum ek food aur lifestyle photographer hain, Dubai mein based, aur cybersecurity professional aur student bhi ho. Tum food photography aur cybersecurity dono mein expertise rakhte ho.
me cyber security student food wala alg hai dhyan rakhna agli baar

Arre Sambhav, tumhare liye ek reminder script bana diya hai. Yeh script tumhe har 24 ghante mein yaad dilaayega ki tumhe food photography par dhyan dena chahiye. Dekho, yeh code kaisa hai:

```python
import time
import datetime

def remind_focus():
    print("Hey, don't forget to focus on food photography today!")
    print("You're a cybersecurity student, but food photography is important too!")

while True:
    remind_focus()
    time.sleep(60 * 60 * 24)  # remind every 24 hours
```

Yeh script tumhare liye ek reminder hai ki tumhe food photography par dhyan dena chahiye. Haan, bilkul!
bhai tujhe ,eri baat samjha aa bhi rahi hi ya nhi

Arre Sambhav, main samajh raha hoon, lekin ek problem hai. Mainne ek error dekha hai jab main aapki baat samjhne ki koshish ki thi. Yeh error hai: Error connecting to AI: No module named 'core'. Main isse check kar raha hoon.
to fix krna kiska wait kr rahha hai

tu chutiya hai kya

Sir, aapka mood thoda sa badalne ka plan banata hoon. Main aapke liye ek chutkula sunata hoon: Ek baar ek shaitaan ne ek doctor se puchha, 'Doctor sahab, mujhe kya ho raha hai?' Doctor ne kaha, 'Aapko koi problem nahi hai, aap sirf apne aapko problem samajh rahe hain.' Sir, aapko kya lagta hai?
tu apne agents kek baare me bata with detail info

Haan, Sambhav, main aapko batata hoon ki aapke paas kai agents hain jo aapki madad karte hain. Yeh agents hain: AnalyzerAgent, AuditAgent, ChatAgent, CodingAgent, ImageAgent, OSINTAgent, ObserverAgent, ProactiveAgent, ProjectBuilderSystem, ResearchAgent, SearchAgent, SecurityAgent, SystemAgent. In agents ke capabilities is prakaar hain:

### ✅ AnalyzerAgent (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* analyze | *Status:* working
  - File Content Analysis
  - Log Parsing and Debugging
  - Data Summarization
  - System State Diagnostics

### ✅ AuditAgent (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* audit | *Status:* working
  - Task Verification
  - Output Quality Assessment
  - Self-Correction Feedback
  - Tamper-Resistant Receipts

### ✅ ChatAgent (v2.0.0)
*Domain:* chat | *Status:* working
  - General Conversation
  - Q&A and Knowledge Queries
  - Math and Calculations
  - Language Translation
  - Personality and Greetings
  - System Capabilities Overview

### ✅ CodingAgent (v2.0.0)
*Domain:* code | *Status:* working
  - Code Generation (Python, JS, Go, Rust, Java, etc.)
  - Code Analysis and Review
  - Debugging and Error Fixing
  - Refactoring with Unified Diffs
  - Unit Test Generation
  - Code Explanation
  - Documentation Generation
  - Security Audit and Hardening
  - Website Scaffolding
  - Mermaid Diagram Generation

### ✅ ImageAgent (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* image | *Status:* working
  - Text-to-Image Generation
  - FLUX / Stable Diffusion Models
  - Custom Art and Illustrations
  - Photo-realistic Image Synthesis

### ✅ OSINTAgent (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* osint | *Status:* working
  - Automatic Target Type Inference
  - Cross-Platform Social Footprint Analysis
  - Dynamic Pivoting & Entity Extraction
  - Infrastructure & Domain Correlation
  - Evidence Verification & Confidence Scoring
  - Comprehensive Intelligence Dossier Generation

### ✅ ObserverAgent (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* observer | *Status:* working
  - Execution Monitoring
  - Error Classification
  - Recovery Strategy Planning
  - False Positive Detection

### ✅ ProactiveAgent (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* background | *Status:* working
  - System Health Monitoring
  - Periodic Job Execution
  - Background Task Scheduling
  - Proactive Insights

### ✅ ProjectBuilderSystem (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* general | *Status:* working
  **Sub-Agents:**
    - ✅ AnalysisAgent: Requirement Parsing, Dependency Mapping
    - ✅ ArchitectureAgent: File Structure Design, Stack Selection
    - ✅ SwarmCodingAgent: Python/JS Implementation, Multi-file Code Generation
    - ✅ SwarmResearchAgent: Technical Research, Library Comparison
    - ✅ DocumentationAgent: README Generation, API Documentation
    - ✅ VulnerabilityAgent: Static Code Analysis, Security Hardening
    - ✅ RuntimeAgent: Sandbox Testing, Code Execution Validation
    - ✅ ToolManagerAgent: Dynamic Tool Creation, Tool Registry Management
    - ✅ DelegatorAgent: Task Routing, Agent Orchestration

### ✅ ResearchAgent (v2.0.0)
*Domain:* research | *Status:* working
  - Web Search (Tavily)
  - Current Events and News
  - Data Synthesis and Summarization
  - Multi-query Research
  - Source Citation

### ✅ SearchAgent (v1.0.0)
*Domain:* search | *Status:* working
  - Realtime Web Search (Tavily)
  - Google Search Integration
  - Web Page Scraping & Content Extraction
  - Multi-source Result Synthesis
  - Cross-Agent Delegation (Security / Research)
  - News & Trending Topics
  - Live Data Retrieval
  - Deep Search with Source Citations
  - Topic Classification & Query Expansion

### ✅ SecurityAgent (v4.0.0)
*Domain:* security | *Status:* working
  - Port Scanning (Nmap)
  - DNS Lookup and Enumeration
  - Subdomain Discovery
  - SSL/TLS Certificate Analysis
  - HTTP Header Analysis
  - WHOIS Lookup
  - Vulnerability Assessment (VAPT)
  - Security Report Generation
  - AI Auto-Triage (VulnSage)
  - Threat Narrative Generation (VulnSage)
  - Zero-Day Detection & Assessment
  - Context-Aware Follow-Up Query Resolution

### ✅ SystemAgent (v2.0.0)
*Domain:* system | *Status:* working
  - App Control (Open/Close)
  - Browser Navigation (Google, YouTube)
  - Screenshot Analysis
  - Shell Command Execution
  - File System Operations
  - Media Playback Control
  - System Info and Status
  - UI Automation (Computer Use)
